title: huperzia pflanzii
intro: Huperzia pflanzii, also known as Chinese club moss, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the Huperziaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Huperzia pflanzii include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and depression, and supporting brain health. Herbal preparations of Huperzia pflanzii include capsules, tablets, and extracts, which can be found in health food stores and online.
